title: Designing a Personalized Recommendation System
scenario: Create a personalized recommendation system that takes into account a user's purchase history, browsing behavior, and demographic information. The system should be able to recommend products based on similarity to the user's past purchases. The input should be a user ID, and the output should be a list of recommended products with their corresponding similarity scores.
constraints: Must include a matrix factorization algorithm
Must be under 200 lines of code
Must handle edge cases where the user has no purchase history

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the response includes a matrix factorization algorithm
Check if the response includes a list of recommended products with similarity scores
Check if the response handles edge cases where the user has no purchase history
Check if the response adheres to best practices for code quality and organization
